title: ProDec 1.5 inch x 50m Low Tack Multi Surface Painters Masking Tape for Delicate Surfaces Gives Sharp Paint Lines for Indoor Painting and Decorating, Compatible with All Paints, 1.5" 38mm wide
features: Low tack, low residue trade quality masking tape made from high quality, easy-tear crepe paper with good resistance to paint bleed
Ideal for newly painted and delicate surfaces where low tack adhesion is required without surface damage
Also suitable for wood, metal, glass, mouldings, switches, sockets and more
Test a small area first and remove ideally before paint dries (max 24 hours after application)
MORE INFORMATION BELOW in the 'From The Manufacturer' section - click on 'See More Product Details' or scroll down
description: From the manufacturer ProDec is the UK's biggest and most widely distributed brand of trade decorating accessories, so whether you're a seasoned pro, enthusiastic DIYer or even a beginner, we've got everything you need for a great finish - just add paint This low tack masking tape enables you to protect surfaces quickly and easily when painting an adjoining surface, preventing unwanted paint marks, flicks and splashes. It has good resistance to paint bleed, giving a crisp straight line and low to zero residue when peeled. The special low tack adhesive means it won't damage newly painted (less than 28 days) and delicate surfaces when removed (check our quick guide below on how to best achieve this). It's also suitable for wood surfaces such as skirting boards, architraves and window sills, metal, glass, mouldings, switches, sockets and more, as well as being ideal for fixing polythene dust sheets to walls, doorways, etc. to prevent overpainting from brushes, rollers and spray. It's easy to tear, enabling quick and convenient coverage of both long and short runs. Top tips for best results with masking tape Apply the tape with even but not excessive pressure Tape should ideally be removed before the paint dries, to prevent any paint skin forming over the join between the tape and the painted surface, and within a maximum of 24 hours after application Always try a small, unobtrusive area first to check compatibility with the surface For delicate or newly painted surfaces, a low tack grade should be used to avoid surface damage Some wallpapers such as painted or highly patterned papers may not be suitable for masking tape - always test first and do not apply with excessive pressure Masking & Warning Tape solutions from ProDec When it comes to masking off areas to protect against unwanted paint marks, flicks and splashes, ProDec has you covered. Our range of masking tapes includes standard and low tack adhesion grades, and we can help you get sharp paint lines with no bleed even on newly painted and delicate surfaces. Our barrier tapes enable you to mark out newly painted or restricted zones in public areas. Precision Edge - standard Made with premium quality Japanese rice paper, Precision Edge masking tape makes achieving razor sharp paint lines simple, protecting surfaces quickly and easily and preventing unwanted paint marks, flicks and splashes. The standard grade is ideal for bare and previously painted surfaces where the paint has fully cured (more than 28 days). Precision Edge - low tack A lower strength adhesive than Standard grade, Low Tack Precision Edge masking tape is ideal for newly painted (less than 28 days) and delicate surfaces where gentle adhesion is required without surface damage. Precision Edge - UV grade UV Resistant Precision Edge masking tape is ideal for hot spots such as conservatories, south facing windows, etc. to prevent excessive adhesion or 'baking on' caused by heat. Plus a low tack adhesive makes it ideal for newly painted (less than 28 days) and delicate surfaces. General purpose masking tape Made from high quality crepe paper that is easy to tear by hand, general purpose masking tape applies evenly and releases smoothly when peeled, leaving no residue. Standard adhesion ideal for bare and previously painted surfaces where the paint has fully cured (more than 28 days). General purpose low tack masking tape Made from high quality crepe paper that is easy to tear by hand, with a low tack adhesive that won't damage newly painted (less than 28 days) and delicate surfaces when removed. It has good resistance to paint bleed, giving a crisp line and no residue when peeled. Long Life masking tape Top quality crepe paper that is heat treated to give excellent barrier properties, featuring a high performance adhesive that is resistant to UV light and heat resistant up to 100°F/38°C, enabling it to be removed up to 21 days after application. Standard adhesion grade. Wet Paint tape Waterproof, non-adhesive barrier tape with a highly visible yellow colour and black ‘Wet Paint’ writing, ideal for highlighting areas that have been freshly painted to prevent people from making accidental contact. Suitable for both interior and exterior use and supplied in a handy dispenser box for rapid application. Barrier tape Waterproof, non-adhesive barrier tape with a highly visible red and white chevron pattern, ideal for marking out temporary obstacles and restricted areas in construction sites and public areas. Suitable for both interior and exterior use and supplied in a handy dispenser box for rapid application.
